title: Filter on Dates
excerpt: Is there a way to filter on specific dates and not the general filter options (i.e. next week, next month, etc. )

posts.author: HarveyHeise (Harvey Heise)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to filter on specific dates and not the general filter options (i.e. next week, next month, etc. )

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Actually there is. Using advanced filtering options, you have all the needed options.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HarveyHeise

As @hlopezvc mentioned, this can be achieved via the Advanced filters, which you can find in the board header:

image1520×1002 109 KB

If you create a filter for the Date column, you will be able to pick the exact date range you would like to filter the board by!

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
